title: Requirements for work visas :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Requirements for work visas
Learn about the different requirements work visas have. For some work visas you will need to earn a specific amount, have a certain level of qualification, or only work for an accredited employer.
- Approved employers Some work visas require your job to be with an employer who is approved or accredited by Immigration New Zealand, to hire people from overseas.
Some work visas require your job to be with an employer who is approved or accredited by Immigration New Zealand, to hire people from overseas.
- Wage rate requirements for visas For some work visas you need to earn more than a certain amount to get the visa. Check if you meet the wage threshold to qualify for the visa you want to apply for.

## Wage rate requirements for visas
For some work visas you need to earn more than a certain amount to get the visa. Check if you meet the wage threshold to qualify for the visa you want to apply for.
- Hourly pay rate calculator This tool calculates the hourly wage rate for a job that is used for an Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV) or skilled residence visa.

## Hourly pay rate calculator
This tool calculates the hourly wage rate for a job that is used for an Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV) or skilled residence visa.
- Green List and seasonal jobs, qualifications and skills Find out about getting registered for your occupation, which jobs are on our Green List or seasonal jobs lists, and whether your qualifications can be used in New Zealand.

## Green List and seasonal jobs, qualifications and skills
Find out about getting registered for your occupation, which jobs are on our Green List or seasonal jobs lists, and whether your qualifications can be used in New Zealand.
- Approved work exchange schemes Work exchange schemes let you experience work, education and culture in New Zealand. Find out which organisations in New Zealand are approved to take part in work exchanges.

## Approved work exchange schemes
Work exchange schemes let you experience work, education and culture in New Zealand. Find out which organisations in New Zealand are approved to take part in work exchanges.
- Visas for tour guides or tour escorts A tour guide and a tour escort have different roles and responsibilities, and their visa requirements are also different.

## Visas for tour guides or tour escorts
A tour guide and a tour escort have different roles and responsibilities, and their visa requirements are also different.
- Apply for a Job Change or a variation of conditions if you have a work visa Use this form to apply for a change to the conditions of your work visa.

## Apply for a Job Change or a variation of conditions if you have a work visa
Use this form to apply for a change to the conditions of your work visa.
- How long you can work on work visas Check how long you can stay in New Zealand on an Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV), Post Study Work Visa or Specific Purpose Work Visa.

## How long you can work on work visas
Check how long you can stay in New Zealand on an Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV), Post Study Work Visa or Specific Purpose Work Visa.
- China Special Work Visa — evidence of qualifications You must provide evidence that you are qualified to do the work you have been offered in New Zealand.

## China Special Work Visa — evidence of qualifications
You must provide evidence that you are qualified to do the work you have been offered in New Zealand.
- Qualifications for Republic of Korea Special Work To apply for a visa under the Republic of Korea Special Work Instructions, you’ll need to have the necessary qualifications and/or practical experience to work in an occupation that’s considered special work under the Republic of Korea Special Work Instructions.

## Qualifications for Republic of Korea Special Work
To apply for a visa under the Republic of Korea Special Work Instructions, you’ll need to have the necessary qualifications and/or practical experience to work in an occupation that’s considered special work under the Republic of Korea Special Work Instructions.
